creator: bsder@allcaps.org
text:
Cy Schubert wrote:
> I am unable to recreate the problem locally. Please indicate what your TERM environment varible contains, prior to invoking screen and within a screen session.
> 
> 

I finally isolated the problem to an interaction between my local 
terminal program and curses by reproducing the bug under Linux with the 
same termcap entry.

This bug can be closed.  It is not a FreeBSD bug.

-a
